resources:
On2Cook A Revolutionary Smart Cooking Device with Combination Cooking Technology. ◉ World\'s Fastest ◉ Proven to be the Healthiest ◉ Cost & Energy Saving. Cooking Something.. Home Please select record to record audio. Utc configuration failed Device is Busy Alerts Logs Already exists Done Week Cook with world\'s fastest cooking device Cook Shop Inventory Explore Plan Ordering
Waiting\u2026 Sending READLOG=%1$s\u2026 Command acknowledged, waiting for data\u2026 Receiving data\u2026 Parsing\u2026 ✓ %1$d rows (%2$s) ✓ Raw data (%1$s) File received but contained no data — file is empty — 0 B Export as CSV Copy Raw No data to export Copied to clipboard
Paired Devices Available Devices Connected Devices Scan For New Devices Bluetooth Devices
This Device Does not Support Bluetooth No Paired Bluetooth Devices Found Searching… Disconnect Disconnected Device Disconnected BluetoothAutoPairActivity
First Fragment Second Fragment Next Previous Please stop fry mode for change oil level
Hello first fragment Hello second fragment. Arg: %1$s Flames Microwave Recently Played Recipes Added Recipe See all Medium Quick Access Action Feedback Modes Manual Recommended Quick Fry Mode Fry Mode + - Min Threshold Select All
Bluetooth is not available Enable bluetooth and try again On Android 6.0 location permission is required. Please enable it in phone settings Location services need to be enabled on Android 6.0 Scan with the same filters is already started Failed to register application for bluetooth scan Scan with specified parameters is not supported Scan failed due to internal error Scan cannot start due to limited hardware resources Android 7+ does not allow more scans. Try in %d seconds Unable to start scanning Unknown error No message found for reason=%d. Consider adding one.
Back SOS Induction Recipe Already Started Recipe Deleted successfully Deleted successfully Sent successfully Microwave Stirrer Sprinkle Spray Power saving time Magnetron Started Magnetron Paused Induction paused Induction Started Food is Overcooked Please Take Food is Cooked Second is too short for update Reached maximum time Please resume microwave Please start Magnetron Please connect to device You have pressed on2cook ai button Selected device is not connected Recipe name too long! Name too long! Please create recipe or import recipe Please add count to start pump Please add ml to start spray Please enter minimum 10 ml to start spray Reached minimum power Reached maximum power Please start induction Please start induction or microwave All Recipes Recipe Copied Please start fry mode Sprinkle is already running Spray is already running
Need Permissions GO TO SETTINGS Error occurred! This app needs permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs location permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs precise location permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs scan nearby devices permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs location and scan nearby devices permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs precise location and scan nearby devices permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings. This app needs device location, which uses Google\'s location service. You can grant them in settings. Device doesn\'t have BLE support! cancel Device is in QuickStart Mode Device is in Cooking Mode

Please grant the permission in settings.
